title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Deloitte India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Deloitte India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Deloitte India Digital Technologies in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Deloitte India Digital Technologies:
Deloitte India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India Digital Technologies!
